• Week 1 | How to Avoid Making Mistakes with Grammar, Punctuation, and Spelling (Presentation)
• Chapter 11 - Reviewing the Basics: Which Word is Correct?
• Chapter 12 - Sentence Writing, Subject-Verb Agreement, Verb Tenses

Break (10 minutes)

IV. Assignment Overview: Narrative Essay Prewriting (Introduction Only) (30 minutes)
1. Purpose of the Narrative Essay
• Students will craft a personal story that conveys a lesson learned or an important moment.
2. Key Components
• Selecting a meaningful personal story.
• Developing a clear beginning, middle, and end.
• Incorporating vivid descriptions and dialogue.
3. Prewriting Strategies
• Freewriting: Set a timer for 5-10 minutes and write nonstop.
• Listing: Brainstorm key events, emotions, and themes.
• Mind Mapping: Visually organize characters, themes, and events.
• Questioning: Ask key questions to develop ideas.
• Outlining: Plan the beginning, middle, and end before drafting.
